The essays

On modernization, layoffs, legacy systems, and the humans navigating all three. Also published on Substack.

April 2026 · 8 min read

The Foreseen Ghost

Laid Off by Design

The second time the ghost came for me, I knew it was over my shoulder. What happens when you engineer your own exit — and the measure of success is no longer being needed?

Read essay
April 2026 · 10 min read

The Unforeseen Ghost

An Evolution of Layoffs

In generations before us, being laid off was a dig at our egos. For millennials in 2026, the ghost is familiar — but we still weren't ready for the reality of living with it.

Read essay
